span.p:
1 · Load
WordFiller.export
read .docx into an XWPFDocument

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2 · Walk
DocumentWalker
headers → body → footers,
recursing into tables & nested tables

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3 · Replace placeholders
PlaceholderReplacer
tokenize runs, join {...} split across runs,
apply \{ \} \\ escapes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4 · Evaluate
TemplateDataProvider (Velocity by default)
run expression against $model;
{|name|} pulls in a nested .vm

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5 · Render value
multi-line results become line breaks

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
6 · Linkify
HyperlinkFormatter
plain http(s):// URLs → clickable runs,
trailing punctuation kept as text
